name: Butter Tart Slice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/2 cup of butter with flour and icing sugar.
2. Press into an 8-inch square pan.
3. Cook uncovered in microwave for 4-5 minutes on full power.
4. Beat together the remaining ingredients, except the raisins.
5. Stir in raisins and pour over base.
6. Bake in microwave for 4-6 minutes on full power.
